product.description: Salmon is an excellent source of vitamin B12, vitamin D and selenium. It is a good source of niacin, omega-3 fatty acids, protein, phosphorus and vitamin B6. The salmon flesh texture are combination of flaky and smooth. It has a mild sweet flavour with strong briny taste. Salmon also taste great even just by baking in oven with olive oil without other seasoning.

metaData.Key Information:
• Packed in the convenient pack where consumer can easily take the portion they want as each piece of salmon slice are packed individually
• Each packet consists of 4 pieces
metaData.Nutritional Data:
Attributes Per Serving
Energy 111kcal
Protein 21g
Total Fat 0.8g
Saturated Fat 0.2g
Monounsaturated Fat 0.1g
Polyunsaturated Fat 0.2g
Trans Fat 0g
Cholesterol 41mg
Carbohydrate 5g
Dietary Fibre 0g
Sodium 667mg
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking instructions:
1. Take out salmon slice from the packet
2. Defrost it
3. Pour some oil into frying pan and heat it up
4. Place salmon slice into pan and fry about 3 to 5 minutes on each side
5. It is ready to be served

product.description: This product may vary from Vietnam / China depending on stock availability

metaData.Key Information:
• Ready to cook shrimp meat

• Firm and springy texture, without the use of seasoning

• Rich shrimp sweetness taste

• Can be cooked in a variety of dishes
metaData.Preparation:
1. In a large bowl, stir together olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, garlic, and black pepper
2. Season with crushed red pepper
3. Add shrimp, and toss to coat
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes
5. Preheat grill for high heat
6. Lightly oil grill grate
7. Grill for 2 to 3 minutes per side, or until opaque
